mapper.sql: m.id, m.member_id AS memberId, m.coupon_id AS couponId, m.coupon_name AS couponName, m.coupon_type AS couponType, DATE_FORMAT(m.receive_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS receiveTime, DATE_FORMAT(m.expire_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS expireTime, CASE WHEN m.use_status = 0 AND m.expire_time <= NOW() THEN 2 ELSE m.use_status END AS useStatus, m.used_order_id AS usedOrderId, DATE_FORMAT(m.used_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS usedTime, c.discount_amount AS discountAmount, c.discount_rate AS discountRate, c.max_discount_amount AS maxDiscountAmount, c.use_threshold_amount AS useThresholdAmount
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO mk_member_coupon (member_id, coupon_id, coupon_name, coupon_type, receive_time, expire_time, use_status) VALUES (#{memberId}, #{couponId}, #{couponName}, #{couponType}, NOW(), DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL #{validDays} DAY), 0)
mapper.select: SELECT FROM mk_member_coupon m LEFT JOIN mk_coupon c ON c.id = m.coupon_id WHERE m.member_id = #{memberId} AND m.use_status = 0 AND m.expire_time > NOW() ORDER BY m.id DESC
SELECT FROM mk_member_coupon m LEFT JOIN mk_coupon c ON c.id = m.coupon_id WHERE m.id = #{memberCouponId} AND m.member_id = #{memberId} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE mk_member_coupon SET use_status = 2 WHERE use_status = 0 AND expire_time < NOW()
